description_long: This is a compact, stylized military tank with a rounded turret and a prominent, forward-facing cannon. The body is painted in a muted olive drab color, featuring a star insignia on the turret and additional markings on the side. The tank is equipped with wide, continuous tracks that wrap around large, robust wheels, providing stability and traction. The front of the vehicle has a slatted grille and two small headlights, while the rear is smooth and slightly domed. The turret appears to be rotatable, and the cannon is the primary weapon mount. The overall design suggests a focus on maneuverability and protection, with visible armor plating covering the entire body.
description: A compact olive drab military tank with a rounded turret, forward cannon, and wide tracks, featuring star insignia and side markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cannon centered, slatted grille, and wide tracks flanking the body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the star insignia on the turret, side markings, and the full length of the cannon and tracks.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, domed back of the turret, rear grille, and the width of the tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with visible star insignia, side markings, and the cannon extending forward.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the front of the turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating is visible, with sloped surfaces on the turret and hull; appears thick and continuous with no modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive drab paint with minimal weathering; no distinct camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White star emblem on both sides of the turret; white text markings on the hull sides.
attribute_tire_type: Not applicable; vehicle uses continuous rubberized tracks.
